Package com.irurueta.geometry.refiners

Interface RefinerListener<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - type of instance to be refined.
    public interface RefinerListener<T>
    Listener for a refiner.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onRefineEnd​(Refiner<T> refiner, T initialEstimation, T result, boolean errorDecreased)
      Called when refinement finishes successfully.
      void onRefineStart​(Refiner<T> refiner, T initialEstimation)
      Called when refinement starts.

    • Method Detail

      • onRefineStart

        void onRefineStart​(Refiner<T> refiner,
                   T initialEstimation)
        Called when refinement starts.
        Parameters:
        refiner - refiner that raised the event.
        initialEstimation - initial estimation before refinement.

      • onRefineEnd

        void onRefineEnd​(Refiner<T> refiner,
                 T initialEstimation,
                 T result,
                 boolean errorDecreased)
        Called when refinement finishes successfully.
        Parameters:
        refiner - refiner that raised the event.
        initialEstimation - initial estimation before refinement.
        result - refined instance.
        errorDecreased - true if error decreased after refinemnt, false otherwise.
